title: Genie feedback workflow and security enhancements
body:
* **Revamped feedback flow in Genie**: The Genie feedback workflow is now more interactive and responsive. When a response is incorrect, you can explain why it's wrong by choosing from a selection of common issues or entering your own explanation. You can regenerate the response based on the feedback you provide, or send it to a space editor for manual review. See  [Response feedback](/aws/en/genie/monitor#response-feedback).
* **Customer-managed key support for Genie**: Genie Spaces created after April 10, 2025 are now encrypted and compatible with customer-managed keys. See [Customer-managed keys for encryption](/aws/en/security/keys/customer-managed-keys).
